heading: Encouragement of States to adopt civil procedure for establishing paternity in contested cases
label: 668 Encouragement of States to adopt civil procedure for establishing paternity in contested cases
text: In the administration of the child support enforcement program under this part, each State is encouraged to establish and implement a civil procedure for establishing paternity in contested cases.
notes: Amendments1996— struck out “a simple civil process for voluntarily acknowledging paternity and” after “implement”.Pub. L. 104–193
